title: Verify Content Locking for Paused/Cancelled Users
description: Tests that a user who has paused or cancelled their trial cannot access any premium content.

steps.description: 1. Note a specific premium movie/show URL.
2. Navigate to the Trial Corner and cancel the trial.
3. Verify content sections in the Trial Corner appear locked.
4. Attempt to navigate directly to the premium content URL from step 1.
5. Attempt to play any content from the main app.

expected_result: The user should be blocked from playing any premium content. Navigating directly to a content URL should either redirect them or show a paywall/error message indicating they do not have access.
